mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_material(course_id, file_name, file_url, file_type, size, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileType}, #{size}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE course_material SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id,course_id,file_name,file_url,file_type,size,create_time,deleted FROM course_material WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id,course_id,file_name,file_url,file_type,size,create_time,deleted FROM course_material WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
